title: Official DPS Public Resources
description: The Department of Public Safety has a variety of groups providing services to the public, if your request falls into the categories below please submit your request through the appropriate channel for faster service.
accessibility_note: The primary Stolen Vehicle Hot Sheet UI (https://hotsheets.dps.alaska.gov/AST/Stolen-Vehicle-Hot-Sheet) is known to have accessibility (A11y) rendering issues. Use the raw API (https://publicdatasets.dps.alaska.gov/api/StolenVehicles/download) when developing robust programmatic clients.
